challenges.name: JustCTF 2025 - Babyheap
challenges.description: Simple heap challenge with UAF vulnerability. Provides alloc, edit, free, read operations. No size param, max 10 slots.

challenges.name: 0xfun Heap Challenge
challenges.description: Heap challenge with alloc/edit/view/free. Uses glibc 2.35 with safe-linking. Has size param.
